name: Beebe Bridge Park
description: Beebe Bridge Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Orondo, WA. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include restrooms and lights. The courts are free.

name: Eastmont Parks & Recreation Pickleball Complex
description: Come play pickleball at Eastmont Parks & Recreation Pickleball Complex in East Wenatchee, WA! There are 6 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Reservations are not available. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms, water, wheelchair accessibility, and lights.

name: Kirby Billingsley Hydro Park
description: Kirby Billingsley Hydro Park is a place to play pickleball in East Wenatchee, WA. There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms.
